position_advice.en: 55% (Maintain — patience is the best strategy now)
position_advice.zh: 55%（维持——耐心是现在最好的策略）

condition.en: Tightening but Decelerating, Inflection in 3-5 Weeks
condition.zh: 紧缩但减速，拐点 3-5 周内

summary.en: The acute phase of the tax-season liquidity drain is over. TGA growth decelerated sharply from +$227B to +$82.7B — the seasonal peak is almost certainly in. Repo lending collapsed from $10.5B to $4M, confirming acute funding stress has fully resolved. SOFR is stable at 3.67%. The structural headwind ($388B three-week drain) has not reversed, but the path to TGA unwind is clear. New variable: Warsh (incoming Fed Chair, 5/15) plans balance sheet reduction — this is a new medium-term risk that could remove the Fed BS expansion as the one remaining positive liquidity factor. Inflection point is now 3-5 weeks away.
summary.zh: 税季流动性抽水的急性阶段已过。TGA 增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降至 +827 亿美元——季节性顶部几乎可以确认。Repo 借贷从 105 亿美元崩溃至 400 万美元，确认急性融资压力已完全解除。SOFR 稳定在 3.67%。结构性逆风（三周 3880 亿美元抽水）尚未逆转，但 TGA 回落路径清晰。新变量：Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）计划缩表——这是新的中期风险，可能消除美联储资产负债表扩张这一唯一剩余的正面流动性因素。拐点现在距离 3-5 周。

fed_balance_sheet_change.en: +$1.7B (WoW) — nearly flat; Warsh plans QT from 5/15
fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: +17 亿美元（周环比）——接近持平；Warsh 计划 5/15 起缩表

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no liquidity buffer remaining
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$82.7B WoW — growth rate slowed sharply from +$227B; peak signal confirmed
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +827 亿美元——增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降；见顶信号明确

net_liquidity_change.zh: -820 亿美元（周环比）/ -3880 亿美元（三周）——抽水减速；SOFR 3.67% 稳定

details.en: Key new risk: Warsh (incoming Fed Chair, 5/15) has signaled balance sheet reduction. If the Fed shifts from flat/expanding to actively shrinking the balance sheet, the one remaining positive liquidity factor disappears. This is a medium-term headwind that needs monitoring. Short-term: TGA should peak within 1-2 weeks and begin seasonal unwind, adding $200-300B back to net liquidity by mid-May. Repo lending at $4M confirms no acute stress. Bank reserves at $2.915T below $3T but stable. The structural tightening continues but the trajectory is improving. SOFR stable at 3.67% is the key health indicator.
details.zh: 关键新风险：Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）已发出缩表信号。如果美联储从持平/扩张转向主动缩表，唯一剩余的正面流动性因素消失。这是需要监控的中期逆风。短期：TGA 应在 1-2 周内见顶并开始季节性回落，在 5 月中旬前向净流动性补充 2000-3000 亿美元。Repo 借贷 400 万美元确认无急性压力。银行准备金 2.915 万亿美元低于 3 万亿美元但稳定。结构性紧缩持续，但轨迹在改善。SOFR 稳定在 3.67% 是关键健康指标。

status.en: Tightening, Decelerating — Warsh QT is New Risk
status.zh: 紧缩但减速——Warsh 缩表是新风险

reason.en: Score holds at 48. TGA growth rate halved (+$82.7B vs +$227B), repo lending zeroed out ($4M), SOFR stable at 3.67%. The acute phase is over. But Warsh (5/15) plans balance sheet reduction — if implemented, this removes the Fed BS expansion as the one remaining positive liquidity factor and creates a new medium-term headwind. Score stays at 48 — not improving further until: (1) TGA confirmed peak + begins unwind, (2) Warsh policy direction clarified. Next week's H.4.1 data is critical.
reason.zh: 分数维持 48。TGA 增速减半（+827 亿美元 vs +2270 亿美元），repo lending 归零（400 万美元），SOFR 稳定在 3.67%。急性阶段已过。但 Warsh（5/15）计划缩表——如果实施，将消除美联储资产负债表扩张这一唯一剩余正面流动性因素，创造新的中期逆风。分数维持 48——在以下条件满足前不会进一步改善：(1) TGA 确认见顶并开始回落，(2) Warsh 政策方向明确。下周 H.4.1 数据至关重要。

status.en: Strong — AI Hardware Validated, NTM Growth 20%
status.zh: 强劲——AI 硬件验证，NTM 增长 20%

reason.en: Score improved from 68 to 70. Intel's best single day since 1987 (+23.65%), AMD +13.91%, NVIDIA +4.33% — AI hardware demand is definitively validated. Overall beat rate 88%, average beat magnitude +13%, NTM EPS revised up, full-year growth consensus rising to 20%. Credit spreads (HY OAS ~285bps) at 2021 lows confirm no credit stress. Score at 70 — strong. Next week is the decisive test: Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta all report. If Mag 5 beats and rallies, score goes to 78+. If beat-and-drop spreads to Mag 5, score falls to 55.
reason.zh: 分数从 68 升至 70。Intel 创 1987 年以来最佳单日（+23.65%），AMD +13.91%，NVIDIA +4.33%——AI 硬件需求得到明确验证。整体 beat rate 88%，平均超幅 +13%，NTM EPS 上修，全年增长共识上调至 20%。信用利差（HY OAS 约 285bps）处于 2021 年低点，确认无信用压力。分数 70——强劲。下周是决定性测试：Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 全部报告。如果 Mag 5 beat 且上涨，分数升至 78+。如果 beat and drop 扩散到 Mag 5，分数降至 55。

status.en: Deteriorating — Biggest Red Flag (54.67% and Declining)
status.zh: 恶化——最大红旗（54.67% 且在下降）

reason.en: Score deteriorated from 45 to 40 — breadth is the most serious concern. Only 54.67% of stocks above their 200DMA (down from 55.66% last week, and from 60.03% two weeks ago). StageAnalysis confirms breadth declined 3.27% this week. S&P/Nasdaq at all-time highs but nearly half of constituents below 200DMA — textbook negative divergence. Dow Jones -0.16% for the week while S&P +0.80% — non-confirmation. Russell 2000 only +0.43% — small caps not participating. Financials only 48.68% above 200DMA. Every sustained bull market breakout has had breadth above 60%. Current 54.67% and declining is the wrong direction.
reason.zh: 分数从 45 降至 40——广度是最严重的担忧。仅 54.67% 的股票在 200 日均线上方（较上周 55.66% 下降，较两周前 60.03% 大幅下降）。StageAnalysis 确认本周广度下降 3.27%。S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高，但近一半成分股在 200 日均线以下——教科书级负面背离。道琼斯本周 -0.16%，而 S&P +0.80%——不确认。Russell 2000 仅 +0.43%——小盘股不参与。金融板块仅 48.68% 在 200 日均线上方。每一次持久的牛市突破广度都在 60% 以上。当前 54.67% 且在下降是错误的方向。

status.en: Strong — Dual New Highs, But Divergences Active
status.zh: 强势——双创新高，但背离活跃

reason.en: Score holds at 72. S&P 500 at 7,165.08 all-time high, Nasdaq at 24,836.60 all-time high. Weekend futures slightly lower: S&P -0.24%, Nasdaq -0.21%, Dow -0.24% — minor pullback, not concerning. VIX declining to 18.71 (-3.11%). Yield curve: 10Y 4.310%, 2Y 3.920%, 30Y 4.916%, 2s10s +39bps (normalizing). Oil retreating: WTI $94.40, Brent $99.13. Gold $4,695.90 (-0.95% on the day but still near all-time high). BTC $78,802 (+1.65%) — recovering. HY OAS ~285bps at 2021 lows. Score at 72 — strong price action. Not higher because VIX 18.71 at all-time high is a divergence, Dow lagging, and weekend futures slightly negative.
reason.zh: 分数维持 72。S&P 500 历史新高 7,165.08，Nasdaq 历史新高 24,836.60。周末期货小幅走低：S&P -0.24%，Nasdaq -0.21%，Dow -0.24%——小幅回调，不令人担忧。VIX 降至 18.71（-3.11%）。收益率曲线：10Y 4.310%，2Y 3.920%，30Y 4.916%，2s10s +39bps（正常化）。油价回落：WTI $94.40，Brent $99.13。黄金 $4,695.90（当日 -0.95%，但仍接近历史新高）。BTC $78,802（+1.65%）——回升。HY OAS 约 285bps 处于 2021 年低点。分数 72——强劲的价格行动。未更高，因为历史新高时 VIX 18.71 是背离，道指落后，周末期货小幅负面。

trading_summary.en:
55.1 — Moderate. Earnings are real: 88% beat rate, NTM growth 20%, Intel validates AI hardware demand. S&P/Nasdaq dual new highs. Credit at 2021 lows. Liquidity's worst shock is behind us.

But breadth is sounding the alarm — 54.67% and declining. S&P at all-time highs but nearly half of constituents below 200-day MA. StageAnalysis confirms breadth declined 3.27% this week. Dow lagging. This is not a healthy broad-based bull market. Warsh's balance sheet reduction plan is a new medium-term risk.

Maintain 55% position. Three waits: (1) Hyperscaler Blitz results next week — Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta (25% of S&P); (2) TGA release confirmation — H.4.1 data; (3) Warsh policy direction. Patience is the best strategy now.
trading_summary.zh:
55.1 分，Moderate。盈利是真实的——88% beat rate，NTM 增长 20%，Intel 验证 AI 硬件需求。S&P/Nasdaq 双创新高。信用处于 2021 年低点。流动性最猛烈的冲击已过。

但广度在发出警报——54.67% 且在下降。S&P 创历史新高，但近一半成分股在 200 日均线以下。StageAnalysis 确认本周广度下降 3.27%。道指落后。这不是健康的广泛牛市。Warsh 缩表计划是新的中期风险。

维持 55% 仓位。三个等：(1) 下周 Hyperscaler Blitz 结果——Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta（S&P 25% 权重）；(2) TGA 释放确认——H.4.1 数据；(3) Warsh 政策方向。耐心是现在最好的策略。

trading_quote: Breadth at 54.67% and declining while indices make new highs — every sustained bull market breakout has had breadth above 60%. This one doesn't. That's the signal.

note.en: All-time high; futures -0.24% Sunday — minor pullback
note.zh: 历史新高；周日期货 -0.24%——小幅回调

note.en: All-time high; futures -0.21% Sunday — concentration extreme
note.zh: 历史新高；周日期货 -0.21%——集中度极端

note.en: Lagging — did NOT confirm S&P/Nasdaq new highs; futures -0.24%
note.zh: 落后——未确认 S&P/Nasdaq 新高；期货 -0.24%

note.en: Small caps not participating in the mega-cap rally
note.zh: 小盘股未参与大型科技反弹

note.en: Short-end stable; rate cut probability holding above 50%
note.zh: 短端稳定；降息预期维持 50% 以上

note.en: Dollar stabilizing — political risk premium removed
note.zh: 美元企稳——政治风险溢价消除

note.en: Slight pullback from all-time high; structural bull intact
note.zh: 从历史新高小幅回调；结构性看涨完整

note.en: Retreating — Hormuz risk premium easing slightly
note.zh: 回落——Hormuz 风险溢价略微缓解

note.en: Near $100 — still elevated; inflation pressure persists
note.zh: 接近 $100——仍高位；通胀压力持续

note.en: Declining but elevated — 18.71 at all-time high is a divergence warning
note.zh: 下降但仍偏高——历史新高时 18.71 是背离警告

analysis.en: BTC +1.65% to $78,802, ETH +2.53% to $2,374 — crypto recovering after last week's divergence (BTC fell while S&P made new highs). Fear & Greed Index at 54 (neutral-slight greed) reflects cautious optimism. Key support at $75,000-$77,000 is holding. If Mag 5 earnings next week beat and rally, BTC should follow toward $82,000-$85,000. If Mag 5 disappoints, BTC could retest $72,000-$75,000. The structural bull case remains intact — institutional adoption, ETF flows, and dollar credibility concerns all support the long-term thesis.
analysis.zh: BTC +1.65% 至 $78,802，ETH +2.53% 至 $2,374——加密货币在上周背离（BTC 下跌而 S&P 创新高）后回升。恐惧贪婪指数 54（中性偏贪婪）反映谨慎乐观。$75,000-$77,000 关键支撑位守住。如果下周 Mag 5 财报 beat 且上涨，BTC 应跟随向 $82,000-$85,000 迈进。如果 Mag 5 令人失望，BTC 可能重测 $72,000-$75,000。结构性看涨逻辑完整——机构采用、ETF 资金流入和美元信誉担忧都支持长期论点。

gold_silver_note.en: Slight pullback from all-time high; Silver $74.86 (-2.03%); structural bull intact
gold_silver_note.zh: 从历史新高小幅回调；白银 $74.86（-2.03%）；结构性看涨完整

key_driver.en: Central Bank Buying + Geopolitical Risk + Dollar Credibility Concerns
key_driver.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险 + 美元信誉担忧

analysis.en: Gold $4,695.90 (-0.95%) — minor pullback from all-time high. Silver $74.86 (-2.03%). Gold/Silver ratio at 62.7. The structural bull case for gold remains fully intact: central bank buying continues, geopolitical risk (Hormuz, Trump-Powell) persists, and dollar credibility concerns are structural. The pullback is healthy consolidation, not a trend reversal. Gold above $4,500 is the key support level. The long-term target of $5,000+ remains in play.
analysis.zh: 黄金 $4,695.90（-0.95%）——从历史新高小幅回调。白银 $74.86（-2.03%）。金银比 62.7。黄金的结构性看涨逻辑完全完整：央行购金持续，地缘政治风险（Hormuz、Trump-Powell）持续，美元信誉担忧是结构性的。回调是健康的整理，不是趋势逆转。$4,500 以上是关键支撑位。$5,000+ 的长期目标仍在视野中。

title.en: Breadth Negative Divergence — Biggest Red Flag
title.zh: 广度负面背离——最大红旗

detail.en: S&P/Nasdaq at all-time highs but only 54.67% of stocks above 200DMA (down from 60.03% two weeks ago). StageAnalysis confirms breadth declined 3.27% this week. Every sustained bull market breakout has had breadth above 60%. Current 54.67% and declining is the wrong direction. Dow Jones not confirming. This is the most important warning signal in the current setup.
detail.zh: S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高，但仅 54.67% 的股票在 200 日均线上方（较两周前 60.03% 大幅下降）。StageAnalysis 确认本周广度下降 3.27%。每一次持久的牛市突破广度都在 60% 以上。当前 54.67% 且在下降是错误的方向。道琼斯不确认。这是当前格局中最重要的警告信号。

title.en: Warsh QT + Hyperscaler Blitz — Double Catalyst Week
title.zh: Warsh 缩表 + Hyperscaler Blitz——双催化剂周

detail.en: Warsh (5/15 incoming Fed Chair) plans balance sheet reduction — if implemented, removes the Fed BS expansion as the one remaining positive liquidity factor. Next week: Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta all report (25% of S&P weight). Beat and rally → conviction 65+. Beat and drop → rally done, reduce to 45%. This is 2026's watershed week.
detail.zh: Warsh（5/15 上任美联储主席）计划缩表——如果实施，将消除美联储资产负债表扩张这一唯一剩余正面流动性因素。下周：Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 全部报告（S&P 25% 权重）。Beat 且涨 → 确信度 65+。Beat and drop → 反弹到头，减至 45%。这是 2026 年的分水岭周。

title.zh: Beat and Drop 扩散 + 估值极端

detail.en: Market only rewards semiconductor blowout beats; punishes everything else. Forward P/E 20.9x, Buffett Indicator P/E above 28 — historically extreme. TGA $1.007T + bank reserves $2.915T + $388B three-week drain still in the system. Oil at $94-99 maintaining inflation pressure. The combination of extreme valuations, selective breadth, and persistent liquidity tightening creates asymmetric downside risk.
detail.zh: 市场只奖励半导体超预期大幅 beat，惩罚其他所有 beat。Forward P/E 20.9x，Buffett 指标 P/E 超 28——历史极端。TGA 1.007 万亿美元 + 银行准备金 2.915 万亿美元 + 3880 亿美元三周抽水仍在系统中。油价 $94-99 维持通胀压力。极端估值、选择性广度和持续流动性紧缩的组合创造了不对称的下行风险。

details.en: ACTIVE — UPGRADED. S&P/Nasdaq at all-time highs but breadth 54.67% and declining (down from 60.03% two weeks ago). Dow Jones not confirming. VIX 18.71 at all-time high — institutions buying insurance. Beat-and-drop persisting outside semiconductors. BTC recovering but still below recent highs. Weekend futures slightly negative. Multiple simultaneous divergences.
details.zh: 活跃且升级。S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高，但广度 54.67% 且在下降（较两周前 60.03% 大幅下降）。道琼斯不确认。历史新高时 VIX 18.71——机构在购买保险。非半导体领域 beat and drop 持续。BTC 回升但仍低于近期高点。周末期货小幅负面。多重同时背离。
